description_long: This lamp features a futuristic, tripod design with three articulated legs ending in wide, circular red-and-black bases that provide stability. The central column rises vertically and supports a hexagonal, honeycomb-patterned lamp head, which is flanked by two angled side panels, creating a wing-like appearance. The lamp head is predominantly black with a textured, grid-like surface, suggesting a high-tech or industrial aesthetic. The legs are segmented and appear to be jointed, allowing for possible adjustment or repositioning. The red and black color scheme gives the lamp a striking, modern look, while the overall structure suggests it is designed for robust outdoor or urban use. The lamp's form and materials indicate it is both functional and decorative, suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, tripod floor lamp with articulated red-and-black legs and a hexagonal, honeycomb-patterned lamp head. Its bold, industrial design is both functional and decorative.
description_view_0: Front view shows the lamp's hexagonal, honeycomb-patterned head and the symmetrical spread of its three articulated legs with red-and-black bases.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angled lamp head and the depth of the central column, with one leg extending forward and the others receding.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the lamp head and the X-shaped support structure, with all three legs visible and evenly spaced.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the lamp head's thickness and the curvature of the legs, with the bases clearly visible.
